title: 3 Long-Term Brand Bets With A Great Track Record That Display Significant Potential - Apple (NASDAQ:AAPL), AutoZone (NYSE:AZO)
text: Throughout his legendary investing career, Warren Buffett has always stressed the importance of seeking out companies that have a durable competitive advantage and, similarly, an impenetrable brand moat. Marquee examples of this in Buffett's own Berkshire Hathaway's (NYSE: BRK-B) portfolio include Apple AAPL, Coca-Cola KO, and Bank of America BAC, among others.

title: AutoZone, Inc. (AZO) Hit a 52 Week High, Can the Run Continue?
text: AutoZone (AZO) is at a 52-week high, but can investors hope for more gains in the future? We take a look at the company's fundamentals for clues.
